ranked_matches.title: PSL 2026: Lahore Qalandars vs Hyderabad Kingsmen (Match Concluded)

summary: The Sheffield Shield Final between Victoria and South Australia is currently live, though Day 1 was heavily affected by rain. The PSL 2026 match between Lahore Qalandars and Hyderabad Kingsmen has concluded with Lahore Qalandars winning by 69 runs. There are no matches for Chandigarh T20 or the AFC U20 Asian Cup today.
